ingredients_text: jumbo flame raisins (30%) [jumbo flame raisins, sunflower oil], golden raisins (20%) [golden raisins, sunflower oil, preservative (sulphur dioxide)], sweetened dried cranberries (20%) [cranberries, sugar, sunflower oil], juice infused dried cherries (15%) [cherry, concentrated apple juice, sunflower oil], juice infused dried blueberries (15%) [dried blueberries, concentrated apple juice, sunflower oil]. allergy advice! for allergens, see ingredients in bold. may also contain nuts and peanuts. suitable for vegetarians.
